title: cobblewariaty
description:
cobblemon 1.7
more starters
rpg like style with cobblemon
body:
Dive into a fully immersive Pokémon-inspired adventure where exploration, combat, and role-playing mechanics blend seamlessly. Built around Cobblemon, this modpack expands your world with RPG progression, dangerous dungeons, powerful loot, and a living adventure ecosystem.

Travel through procedurally generated biomes filled with wild Cobblemon, discover mystical structures, and conquer dungeons packed with mobs, traps, and bosses. Level up your character with skills, classes, gear progression, and magic systems, letting you strengthen both your Cobblemon team and your own abilities as a player.

Whether you're exploring ancient ruins, challenging dungeon bosses for rare loot, completing quests, or building a base with your Cobblemon companions, this modpack offers a rich blend of Pokémon collecting and classic RPG dungeon-crawling.
